verifications.evidence: FGAP-035 closure verified at HEAD e88d7ee. Implementer commit f17efa3 applied 11 cascade-target rows verbatim; follow-up commit e88d7ee dropped 12th forbidden-phrase site at project-dir.ts:44 (BootstrapNotFoundError JSDoc) surfaced by adversarial probe. Post-commit greps: `grep -rn '= PROJECT_DIR' packages/pi-context/src/` returns 0; `grep -rn '".project"' packages/pi-context/src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v .test.ts | grep -v project-dir.ts` returns 0; forbidden JSDoc-framing phrases grep across project-dir.ts + index.ts returns 0. Round-trip positive-demo confirms cascade-through-pointer works with caller-supplied non-default contextDir. Test counts post-commit (via husky pre-commit hook landing): pi-context 401/0/0; pi-jit-agents 150/0/1; pi-workflows 824/0/2; pi-behavior-monitors 157/0/0. Adversarial probe verdict: 9 PASS / 1 INCONCLUSIVE (Q10 husky-test-log not persisted; substantively PASS — exit-code IS verification). FGAP-035 closed; TASK-021 phase-1 acceptance criterion 4 met via prior 1.3.A read-config/read-schema tools.

Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 implementation context compiled via this script) validated end-to-end: compile-task-context.ts produced compiled-contexts/task-block-fgap035.md; that task-block fed into compile-implementation-context.ts which produced compiled-contexts/implementation-fgap035-rendered-context.md (472 lines); implementer agent (general-purpose) consumed the rendered context and committed f17efa3 applying all 11 cascade-target rows + e88d7ee for the 12th forbidden-phrase site. verifications.evidence: FGAP-076 config-write dual-surface unit — commit 2eb9abf. Shipped: project-context amendConfigEntry over REGISTRY_DESCRIPTORS (all 11 registries, 4 keying kinds) + Pi tool amend-config + scripts/orchestrator/amend-config.ts + config-write.test.ts (15 cases). Verified DEC-0018: build/check/test green (pi-context 516 [+15] / 151 / 157 / 829, 0 fail). Two issues found-and-fixed mid-verification: (1) TOOL bug — the add/replace entry-required guard wrongly applied to string-array registries where the key IS the value (installed_schemas add needs no separate entry); fixed by exempting descriptor.kind==='string-array'. (2) TEST bug — case 13 asserted issue.code==='edge_unknown_relation_type', but validateProject's own edge-integrity loop emits the unregistered-relation_type issue message-only (code undefined); that code belongs to validateRelations which validateProject filters to cycle-only; fixed to match message. Also refactored the CLI dry-run to route SHAPE validation through amendConfigEntry(dryRun:true) (which validates the would-be-written config against the same schema writeConfig uses), removing the applyToClone parallel mutation path. Runtime demo: library (add/replace/remove across keyed-array+map with previousValue, out-of-enum AJV reject, mtime-cache fresh-read, dry-run inert + SHAPE-catch) + CLI (dry-run inert / real json / add-collision exit-5 / bad-arg exit-2). Adversarial: writeConfig is the SOLE config.json writer; amendConfigEntry routes through it; zero applyToClone/parallel mutation path; deferred-cross-ref proof (remove still-referenced relation_type succeeds, validateProject flags it). Registration via SKILL.md.
